subject: fix(triggers): remove auto-advance, always pause after each trigger
body:
The auto-advance rule let the AI skip through all triggers in one
message when findings were empty. This defeats the purpose of the
sequential sweep. Now the AI must always stop and wait for the user
after each trigger, even with no findings.

Tags: documentation, triggers, process
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: patch
title: remove auto-advance, always pause after each trigger
